title: [PR] fix(read): report zero lines for an empty file
summary:
### Problem

`readFileInRangeFast` (`src/utils/readFileInRange.ts`) runs its "final fragment (no trailing newline)" block unconditionally after the newline-scan loop. For an empty (0-byte) file the loop never runs, then the final block computes `text.slice(0) === ''`, pushes it, and does `lineIndex+
